features: THREE POPULAR FRAGRANCES: Includes Ice Cool (fresh & crisp), New Car (clean & classic), and Vanilla (warm & comforting).
LONG-LASTING FRESHNESS: Premium fragrance oils provide consistent scent release for weeks of freshness.
POWERFUL ODOUR ELIMINATOR: Neutralises smells from food, pets, smoke, and daily use - not just masking them.
MADE IN THE UK: Proudly manufactured in the United Kingdom using high-quality ingredients.
EASY HANGING DESIGN: Ideal for cars, vans, wardrobes, lockers, offices, and other small spaces.
GREAT VALUE 3-PACK: Enjoy variety and flexibility - rotate scents or freshen multiple vehicles at once.
PERFECT GIFT OPTION: A versatile and practical gift for drivers, families, or car enthusiasts.
description: Mighty Oak Air Freshener Triple Pack – Ice Cool, New Car & Vanilla (3 Pack) Long-Lasting Hanging Car Deodoriser - Odour Eliminator - UK-Made Car Freshener Set Enjoy freshness your way with the Mighty Oak Air Freshener Triple Pack. Featuring three popular fragrances - Ice Cool, New Car, and Vanilla. This set lets you switch scents to match your mood or keep multiple spaces smelling great. Crafted in the UK using premium fragrance oils, each hanging air freshener delivers long-lasting freshness while effectively neutralising unwanted odours. Ideal for cars, vans, taxis, and small spaces, this value 3-pack offers variety, convenience, and excellent performance. Whether you prefer crisp and refreshing, clean and classic, or warm and comforting, Mighty Oak has you covered.
